style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white crackle around Mewtwo's form, drifting erratically like floating fireflies. A vibrant, pulsing aura of electric yellow-orange radiates from its body, distorting the air with subtle electromagnetic shimmering waves. The lighting mood is intense and dynamic, with sharp highlights reflecting off its sleek fur and glowing eyes casting a cool neon glow on the surroundings. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
